title: Sausage Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish made with Italian sausage and vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced fennel and cook for 3-4 minutes, until it starts to soften.
Add the Italian sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Add the soy sauce and stir to coat.
Reduce heat to medium and simmer for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the sesame seeds and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
